# Kottu Saikumar — Portfolio

> Full-Stack AI Developer based in Hyderabad, India. Builds RAG systems,
> ML pipelines, computer vision, and full-stack products.

This is a single-page portfolio site. It is a client-rendered React app;
an agent fetching the raw HTML without executing JavaScript will not see
the page's content directly (see note below).

## Sections
- Skills — technical stack (AI/ML, full-stack, tools)
- Experience — work history
- Process — how projects are approached
- Projects — selected work with live links and short descriptions
- Proof — testimonials / social proof
- Contact — GitHub, LinkedIn, X, and a WhatsApp-based contact form

## Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/kottusaikumar
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sai-kumar-10541b269
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/433Saikumar

## Note for automated fetchers
This site does not currently server-render or prerender its HTML — all
content is mounted by React after JavaScript executes. Agents/crawlers
that don't run JavaScript should not assume the raw HTML response
reflects the page's actual content.
